title: Inclusive Transport Strategy evaluation
body: "These reports present the finding from an evaluation that took place in the years following publication of the Inclusive Transport Strategy, from 2020 to 2024.  The research comprises of:   an evaluation summary report focusing on learnings and lessons for future policy a follow up report that presents final results from the evaluation, reviews the implementation of the strategy and assesses any change in outcomes since publication of the baseline report  a technical report on wave 2 research activities that follows on from a wave 1 technical report  a report that focuses on understanding disabled people’s lived transport experiences through an analysis of qualitative interviews a report on understanding confidence to travel among disabled and non-disabled people that explores barriers to travel and identifies potential policy interventions   The Department for Transport commissioned NatCen to carry out this research.  An update to the Inclusive Transport Strategy scorecard has also been published. "
